name: tablehandles
description: Hover any HTML table, grab a row/column handle, copy as TSV or Markdown.

scripts.zip: rm -f dist/tablehandles-${npm_package_version}.zip && mkdir -p dist && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && zip -r "dist/tablehandles-${npm_package_version}.zip" manifest.json icons src -x '*.DS_Store'
